/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/turboquant_test.dir/turboquant/test_main.cpp.o -o turboquant_test  libturboquant_lib.a /tmp/mlx-source/build/libmlx.a -framework Metal -framework MetalKit -framework Foundation -framework Accelerate
